description:
In this video, you'll learn:

What Makefiles are and why you should use them
Basic Makefile syntax and structure
How to define targets and dependencies
Using variables and functions to create flexible Makefiles
Best practices for writing clean and efficient Makefiles
Whether you're a beginner or an experienced developer, this tutorial will help you master the art of Makefiles and take your build process to the next level.

#linux #makefile #tutorial #build #automation #development #opensource
